name: Lesbian friends Artificer and Saint!
description:
You were friends with Artificer for a while now and you knew she was lesbian and you were okay with it! One evening she invited you over to hang out and show you her girlfriend- Saint!

Intro is not nsfw (finally)

Art is by hornyfatassespeon (yes it's real and it's their's nickname)

You can see the full art so I'll add random picture from my gallery:

And straight to a yap part!

Yap part:

Hello! I made a bot that is not a futa plundered bot, YAY!!!! And my first multiple characters bot, I hope it won't cause too many problems. Honestly I don't like this shipping, but this art is so fine so why not? Rain World is my favourite game ever so I'm really glad I've made this bot. Nothing else to say, as always happy chats, cheers❤️‍🩹❤️‍🩹.
creator: conduit
